# IPL Prediction 2026 — iplprediction2026.in

> A free cricket prediction platform where fans predict IPL match winners and compete against an AI. Zero money. Pure bragging rights.

## What is this?

IPL Prediction 2026 is India's fan cricket prediction community. Users predict which team will win each IPL 2026 match, see what the AI predicts, and compete on a leaderboard. No betting, no money — just cricket knowledge and gut instinct.

## Core Idea: Human Can Beat AI

The platform is built around a single belief: a passionate cricket fan with good instincts can outpredict a machine. AI models work on historical averages — they don't feel momentum, they don't know about dressing room tensions, and they can't account for the crowd going crazy at Eden Gardens. You can. That's the edge.

This mirrors real-world evidence:
- Crowd prediction markets regularly beat algorithmic models in cricket
- Magnus Carlsen still beats chess engines in blitz despite computers being "stronger"
- Nate Silver's model got the 2016 US election wrong — a political junkie with good intuition did not
- Betfair's in-play crowd odds outperform ML models in live cricket regularly

## Features

- Browse upcoming IPL 2026 matches with live odds
- Predict the winner before each match
- See the AI's prediction and probability
- Track your score on the leaderboard
- Beat the AI for bonus points
- Mobile-first, works on any device
- Free to play, no account required to browse

## Scoring

- Correct prediction: +10 points
- Underdog winner (you picked the underdog): +15 points
- Beat the AI's prediction: +5 bonus points

## Technology

Built with Next.js 14, Supabase, and The Odds API for live match data.

## URLs

- Homepage: https://iplprediction2026.in
- Login: https://iplprediction2026.in/login
- Sign up: https://iplprediction2026.in/signup
- Results: https://iplprediction2026.in/results

- Website: https://iplprediction2026.in
